review.notes: Draft accurately reflects all key details in the OCR: score (9-3), opponents (Pembroke Lumber Kings), venue (Humboldt, SK), all nine Sockeyes goal scorers, shot differential (44-32), period-by-period leads (1-0, 3-0), the Broncos' undefeated round-robin record including their 6-1 win over Richmond, and the Dartmouth Fuel Kids as the fourth team.
